requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容与无线电范围
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容與無線電範圍

summary.en: Singapore applies a telecom-equipment registration pathway only when a product contains radio-frequency transmission function, and IMDA controls apply to those products before market placement. Household refrigerators without intentional radio modules are generally not subject to a separate IMDA EMC approval route, so they are usually managed as safety and efficiency controlled appliances through other Singapore programs instead of a dedicated equipment-radio conformity route.
summary.zh: 新加坡仅对含有无线电频率发送功能的产品适用电信设备注册路径，含无线发射功能产品需在投放市场前按IMDA要求处理。一般不带通讯模块的家用冰箱不会独立走IMDA电磁兼容路线，通常由其他新加坡安全和能效项目进行管理。
summary.zht: 新加坡僅對含有無線電頻率發射功能的產品適用電信設備註冊路徑，含無線發射模組產品需在投放市場前按IMDA要求處理。一般不帶通訊模組的家用冰箱不會獨立走IMDA電磁相容路徑，通常由其他新加坡安全和能效項目進行管理。

standards_or_laws: IMDA equipment registration regime for radio communication equipment
Singapore product-safety pathway for household appliances when no dedicated telecom function is present

summary.en: China does not have a separate IMDA-equivalent telecom EMC scheme for non-radio household refrigerators. Chinese exporters rely on GB safety and EMC clauses within the same product baseline, such as GB 4706.13 safety requirements and GB 4343.1 EMC requirements when CCC applies.
summary.zh: 中国对不含无线功能的家用冰箱并不存在与IMDA对等的独立无线电类EMC制度。中国出口商通常依赖GB 4706.13安全条款和在CCC适用情形下的GB 4343.1电磁兼容条款作为基础合规。
summary.zht: 中國對不含無線功能的家用冰箱並不存在與IMDA對等的獨立無線電類EMC制度。中國出口商通常依賴GB 4706.13安全條款和在CCC適用情況下的GB 4343.1電磁相容條款作為基礎合規。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13 — Appliance safety requirements for household refrigerators
GB 4343.1 — Electromagnetic compatibility for household appliances where applicable to CCC scope

gap.en: The practical gap is classification: Singapore importers must confirm whether the export model includes any radio module (for smart monitoring, app connectivity, or wireless control). If present, IMDA registration logic may apply; if absent, exporters should focus on CPSR and electrical safety obligations. Chinese baseline compliance documents alone do not prove the IMDA telecom scope conclusion for the Singapore destination model.
gap.zh: 实际差距在于机型分类。若出口型号包含智能监测、应用连接或无线控制模块，新加坡需再次确认是否触发IMDA注册逻辑；若未含该功能，则通常按CPSR及安全路径处理。中国基础合规文件本身不能直接证明该新加坡机型在IMDA电信范围下已被判定为免除。
gap.zht: 實際差距在於機型分類。若出口型號包含智能監測、應用程式連接或無線控制模組，新加坡需再次確認是否觸發IMDA註冊邏輯；若未含該功能，則通常按CPSR及安全路徑處理。中國基礎合規文件本身不能直接證明該新加坡機型在IMDA電信範圍下已被判定為免除。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — mandatory only for models with radio transmission capabilities; otherwise not a dedicated Singapore telecom EMC condition
mandatory_status.cn: Conditionally not directly applicable — Chinese domestic process for non-radio refrigerators is handled under safety/EMC clauses within GB framework

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Singapore separation of telecom EMI obligations is model-specific. Reputable exporters should first confirm whether the outbound model contains radio functionality. For standard refrigerators with no intentional RF transmitter, the key gap usually shifts to CPSR safety and MELS energy obligations, not IMDA registration by itself.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 新加坡对无线电EMI义务有明确的型号区分逻辑。建议出口商先确认出口型号是否含无线功能。对标准不含主动发射器的冰箱，主要差距通常为CPSR安全与MELS能效义务，而不是单独IMDA注册问题。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 新加坡對無線電EMI義務有明確的型號區分邏輯。建議出口商先確認出口型號是否含無線功能。對標準不含主動發射器的冰箱，主要差距通常為CPSR安全與MELS能效義務，而不是單獨IMDA註冊問題。
